scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @tutor-advantage/shared-config && npm run build -w @tutor-advantage/database
scripts.build: npm run build -w student-liff && npm run build -w tutor-pwa && npm run build -w admin-console
scripts.build:services: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run build -w identity-service" "npm run build -w learning-service" "npm run build -w finance-mlm-service"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w student-liff && npm run lint -w tutor-pwa && npm run lint -w admin-console
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev -w identity-service" "npm run dev -w learning-service" "npm run dev -w finance-mlm-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "services,student-liff,ngrok,tutor-pwa,admin-console" -c "magenta,green,blue,cyan,yellow,red" "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev -w student-liff" "ngrok http 3004" "npm run dev -w tutor-pwa" "npm run dev -w admin-console"
